bead.title: Stage 4.12: Workers page — list + live log via workerProgress subscription (LARGE)
bead.description: New files: src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/workers/+page.svelte, src/routes/nodes/[nodeId]/workers/[workerId]/+page.svelte, worker.gql, workerProgress.gql. List populates from workers query. Click opens detail with live log tail via subscription. See docs/plan-svelte-migration.md Stage 4 bead #46.
bead.acceptance: (1) MANUAL: start a worker via `ddx agent execute-loop --once`. (2) Open its detail page in the UI. (3) See log lines stream in real time as the agent runs. (4) Record at least 5 streamed log lines in the completion note.
